title: Property
description: An attribute or relationship of a concept. Describes what data a concept carries and how it relates to other concepts or literal values. Properties are derived from SHACL shapes, not OWL domain/range.

name.description: Human-readable display name from SHACL sh:name.

domainInformative.description: Informative domain (typically used with). From rdfs:domain.

rangeInformative.description: Informative range (expected value type). From rdfs:range.

derived.description: Whether the property is populated by a SHACL Rule.

editorWidget.description: DASH editor widget identifier for form rendering.

viewerWidget.description: DASH viewer widget identifier for display rendering.

usedBy.description: URIs of concepts that use this property (1..*).

group.description: URI of the property group this belongs to (0..1).

suggestions.description: URIs of suggestion generators for this property (0..*).
